examples: "Can you tell me," asked the girl, "if my betrothed husband lives here?"
The girl did not care for the man as a girl ought to care for her betrothed husband.
His first betrothed heard of this, and fretted so much about his faithfulness that she nearly died.
Irene is even more upset when Andronico tells her that she's now betrothed to him, not Tamerlano.
According to legend, Guinevere, daughter of the Welsh giant Gorgyrfan Gawr, became betrothed to Arthur on hill's grassy slopes.
